runs.note:
Implemented secure refresh token rotation in token-service.js. Key changes:
- Added refresh token rotation, including generating a new refresh token on each refresh
- Implemented replay detection - if a used refresh token is presented, the entire token family is revoked
- Added absolute lifetime of 90 days for refresh tokens
- Reduced access token lifetime to 5 minutes
- Added audit logging for all token events
